title: adicea insolens
side_effects: Adicea insolens can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to these compounds can also lead to kidney damage and liver failure. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can cause convulsions, hallucinations, and even coma in severe instances. Furthermore, improper use can also trigger allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itching, in individuals with sensitive skin.
